# Pre-Arrival Checklist

Before a vehicle shipment reaches berth, the operations coordinator should confirm:
- Form M approved
- Bill of Lading received
- PAAR submitted
- PAAR issued
- Customs duty payment prepared
- Trucking capacity tentatively booked

If two or more items are still incomplete inside the 7-day realistic berth window, the shipment should be flagged as action-needed.
